art_brief:
VISUAL DIRECTION FOR GENERATED DESIGNS:

The references represent a bold, art-directed aesthetic that MUST be reflected in every generated interface.

PRINCIPLES EXTRACTED FROM REFERENCES:
- Strong use of color gradients and layered depth
- Organic shapes, waves, and flowing forms as visual anchors
- Premium feel with high contrast and sophisticated compositions
- Typography as the dominant visual element in many references
- Rich color palettes that go beyond typical SaaS blues and grays
- Mix of order and visual tension — structured but not rigid
- Editorial and campaign-quality compositions, not template-like
- 3D elements, abstract shapes, and graphic objects used with purpose
- Dark themes with luminous accent colors
- Asymmetric layouts that break grid conventions

MANDATORY DESIGN LANGUAGE:
- The generated page must look like it was art-directed by a creative director
- Every section needs visual personality — no two sections should feel alike
- Use bold typography, rich gradients, organic shapes, and layered depth
- Avoid any appearance of a generic SaaS template
- Think: fashion landing page, premium portfolio, campaign site — NOT dashboard template
